name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for MAS

labels: enhancement

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that MAS doesn't help with today? A concrete
     packaging-desk situation is more useful than an abstract "MAS should have X". -->

## What you'd like MAS to do

<!-- One or two paragraphs. Sketches, mockups, or references to similar behaviour
     in other tools are welcome. -->

## What you tried instead

<!-- Optional. Existing workaround, if any — helps me understand how urgent this is. -->

## Notes on scope

<!--
A quick reality check before you submit — MAS 2.0 stays a single-machine tool.
Feature requests that require any of the following are outside scope and will
be declined with an explanation:

  - a server component or hosted service
  - user/tenant management, sharing, or collaboration features
  - integrations with paid third-party licences
  - platforms other than Windows

Everything else is fair game — if you're unsure, ask first in Discussions.
-->
